summary: Completed comprehensive testing of facial recognition feature implementation including face-api.js integration, face matching API, and UI components
passed_tests: POST /api/face-match endpoint with face descriptor matching
Person creation with face_descriptor field storage
Euclidean distance face matching algorithm (92.5% confidence for similar faces)
Scan Face button visibility and functionality in header
Face Scanner modal opening/closing with proper UI elements
Camera controls (Start/Stop Camera buttons) in Face Scanner
Scanning UI with reticle and face detection indicators
Add Person modal photo upload dropzone functionality
Person creation form with social network toggles
Face descriptor extraction integration in Add Person flow
Overall application UI responsiveness and navigation

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (all core UI features working, camera access fails in test environment as expected)
